--- !bad_revoke_delete_on_all_sequences.sql
REVOKE DELETE ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA s1 FROM ROLE r1

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/ddl/!bad_revoke_delete_on_all_sequences.sql:1:8: expected sequence privilege: SELECT, UPDATE
  1|  REVOKE DELETE ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA s1 FROM ROLE r1
   |         ^~~~~~


--- AST

    NodeEnd: 56,
    Tokens:  []*token.Token{
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Raw:      "REVOKE",
        AsString: "REVOKE",
        End:      6,
      },

        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",
        Raw:      "DELETE",
        AsString: "DELETE",
        Pos:      7,
        End:      13,
      },

        Kind:  "ON",

        Raw:   "ON",
        Pos:   14,
        End:   16,
      },

        Kind:  "ALL",
        Space: " ",
        Raw:   "ALL",
        Pos:   17,
        End:   20,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",

        AsString: "SEQUENCES",
        Pos:      21,
        End:      30,

        Kind:  "IN",
        Space: " ",
        Raw:   "IN",
        Pos:   31,
        End:   33,

        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",

        AsString: "SCHEMA",
        Pos:      34,
        End:      40,
      },

        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",

        AsString: "s1",
        Pos:      41,
        End:      43,

        Kind:  "FROM",
        Space: " ",

        Pos:   44,
        End:   48,

        Space:    " ",

        Pos:      54,
